2606.11052.title: Attention Amnesia in Hybrid LLMs: When CoT Fine-Tuning Breaks Long-Range Recall, and How to Fix It
2606.11052.paper_summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is widely adopted to improve reasoning ability, yet we find that it systematically degrades long-context recall in hybrid linear-attention models. Across architectures including HypeNet and Jet-Nemotron, retrieval performance on Needle-In-A-Haystack (NIAH) deteriorates substantially after CoT-SFT, and the degradation becomes more severe under harder retrieval settings and longer context windows. For example, HypeNet-9B on NIAH-S2@256K decreases from $67.2\%$ to $9.4\%$. We attribute this to CoT-SFT biasing attention gradients toward short-range patterns, disrupting query-key projections ($W_Q, W_K$) that are responsible for long-range routing. Motivated by this observation, we propose QK-Restore, a training-free method that restores only $W_Q$ and $W_K$ from the pre-SFT checkpoint while preserving all other post-SFT parameters. We further introduce a Procrustes variant to balance routing preservation and reasoning adaptation. Across architectures, QK-Restore consistently restores long-context capability at zero training cost while preserving reasoning performance; for instance, on HypeNet-5B it improves S3@256K from $65.4\%$ to $76.4\%$ while maintaining strong reasoning performance.
2606.11052.paper_summary_zh: Chain-of-thought (CoT) 監督微調 (SFT) 被廣泛採用以提升推理能力，然而我們發現它系統性地降低了混合線性注意力模型中的長期記憶回憶。<lb/>在包括 HypeNet 和 Jet-Nemotron 的架構中，針對 Needle-In-A-Haystack (NIAH) 的檢索性能在 CoT-SFT 後顯著下降，且在更困難的檢索設定和更長的上下文窗口下，降幅更為嚴重。<lb/>例如，HypeNet-9B 在 NIAH-S2@256K 的表現從 $67.2\%$ 降至 $9.4\%$。<lb/>我們將此歸因於 CoT-SFT 使注意力梯度偏向短期模式，干擾了負責長期路由的查詢-鍵投影 ($W_Q, W_K$)。<lb/>基於這一觀察，我們提出了 QK-Restore，一種無需訓練的方法，僅從預 SFT 檢查點恢復 $W_Q$ 和 $W_K$，同時保留所有其他後 SFT 參數。<lb/>我們進一步引入了一種 Procrustes 變體，以平衡路由保留和推理適應。<lb/>在各種架構中，QK-Restore 一致地在零訓練成本下恢復長期上下文能力，同時保持推理性能；例如，在 HypeNet-5B 上，它將 S3@256K 的表現從 $65.4\%$ 提升至 $76.4\%$，同時保持強大的推理性能。
2606.11052.author: Xinyu Zhou et.al.
2606.11052.authors: Xinyu Zhou, Boyu Zhu, Yi Xu, Zhiwei Li, Yingfa Chen, Huiming Wang, Zhijiang Guo
